sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36770" key="e)canayh/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξανα-ψήχω</orth>, <sense id="n36770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corrode,</tr_> interpol. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Flor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.53</biblScope> </bibl> Meineke.</sense> </entryFree>
